case_title: SOPHIA ANN LEE VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, SFMTA et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO SERVICE FEE) SERVED FEB-02-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, SFMTA
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-23-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-23-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEE, SOPHIA ANN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, SFMTA $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,610.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY LEE, SOPHIA ANN AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, SFMTA FLORES, JAMES CHRISTOPHER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-23-2011 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO JAMES CHRISTOPHER FLORES BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF MAR-23-2011 AT 8:30AM.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, SFMTA

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE BY THE SHERIFF DEPT., RETURNED "UNSUCCESSFUL/MUNI NOT ALLOWED PERSONAL SERVICE FOR EMPLOYEES". FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, SOPHIA ANN AS TO DEFENDANT FLORES, JAMES CHRISTOPHER

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-23-2011 - JUDGMENT.
